rawContent: Task: 863-260409-174540 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 863-260409-174540 completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each (~251s duration, full mode), verifying graph memory commit after nudge. The verify stage reported FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations (TS2344 errors in validator.ts), yet the pipeline proceeded through review-fix and ship without blocking, updating PR #843. This is the twelfth consecutive run exhibiting this identical pattern where verify FAIL does not prevent shipment. | Pattern: This is the twelfth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, 858, and now 863) exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw: verify stage reports FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations or test failures, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. Eleven prior retrospectives across two days recommended adding a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that halts when verify reports FAIL, but no implementation has occurred. | Suggestion: Implement the verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template that was recommended in eleven prior retrospectives without implementation. This requires a configuration change to the ship stage template: add a check that reads the verify stage exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed typecheck validation. This is a recurring issue requiring immediate structural fix, not another observational recommendation. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage. Verify stage reports FAIL with PagesPageConfig type constraint violations (TS2344) but ship stage completes with 0 retries and proceeds to update PR. | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
